summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned. Deterministic validation identified 21 targets as security-sensitive, so those exact PRs are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions. Already-closed PRs remain keep_closed; non-security PRs not flagged by validation remain keep_independent.
